pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting environment setup script (setup_gvsig.sh) which downloads the Natural Earth zip and extracts to /home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers.
Task instructions and explicit checks in verifier.py confirm this is the expected target file path.
Task instructions and explicit checks in verifier.py confirm this is the expected target file path.

Geopandas spatial analysis script overlaying 110m countries (177 features) and 1.0-degree buffered 110m rivers (13 features) yields 244 resulting multipolygons, confirming >200 is a safe and correct minimum threshold for a successful union.
Explicitly defined in the task.json instructions: 'Distance: 1.0 (degrees)'.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real spatial datasets from Natural Earth (110m countries and rivers) located at /home/ga/gvsig_data. A successful geoprocessing workflow requires a 1.0-degree buffer around the rivers saved to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/river_buffers.shp, followed by a union with the countries layer, saving to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/countries_rivers_union.shp. Independent geoprocessing verification using Geopandas confirms that the resulting union correctly generates at least 244 polygon features, validating the task's 200 minimum feature threshold.
